title: 카카오, 6G 네트워크 시범 서비스 개시
summary: 카카오가 세계 최초로 6G 네트워크 시범 서비스을 서울 일부 지역에서 개시했습니다.
content: Kakao launched the world's first 6G network pilot service today. The trial covers select areas in Seoul with advanced connectivity. Download speeds reached unprecedented levels during testing. Latency was reduced to near zero for connected devices. Smart city applications will benefit from this technology. Autonomous vehicle testing will use the 6G network. Medical remote surgery demonstrations are planned for next month. User feedback collection has already begun. Full commercial launch is expected within two years. International telecom companies are monitoring the trial closely. Experts call this a revolutionary step in communications.
